architecture.label: Architecture

System Design
Showcase
architecture.desc: The system follows a modular architecture with Laravel at its core, handling RESTful API requests, authentication via JWT, data persistence in MySQL, media storage through Cloudinary, and third-party integrations for shipping (GHN) and payments (VNPay). An AI recommendation engine enhances user experience with personalized product suggestions.
